title: Aurora 61562, tabby McTat Cat 9in, Soft Toy, Grey and White
features: Meet Tabby McTat, the cat soft toy that'll steal your heart with every hug! Inspired by the famous beautiful picture book Tabby McTat by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler. This is a cute sitting cat with a green scarf around its neck.
100% Official Merchandise: Produced by Aurora under license.

This cat soft toy, which measures 23cm and is suitable for all ages, is perfect for any occasion, whether it's a birthday or just a general gift. Everyone will adore this lovable grey and white striped cat soft toy, and it's a great addition to any collection.

As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, the Tabby McTat comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and cloth labels are made from recycled materials.
As an industry leader with 40 years of experience, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing high-quality plush products that bring joy and laughter to people all around the world.
description: Product Description Meet Tabby McTat, the cat soft toy that'll steal your heart with every hug! Inspired by the famous beautiful picture book Tabby McTat by Julia Donaldson and Axel Scheffler. This is a cute sitting cat with a green scarf around its neck. Tabby McTat tells the story of a busker (Fred) and his cat, as they spend their days entertaining passers-by together on city streets. The themes of the story surround the importance of friendship and family. This cat soft toy, which measures 23cm and is suitable for all ages, is perfect for any occasion, whether it's a birthday or just a general gift. Everyone will adore this lovable grey and white striped cat soft toy, and it's a great addition to any collection. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, the Tabby McTat comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable, and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in creating and producing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
